<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. Two-sentence "what + why" before the diff
is usually enough; the full PR checklist lives in CONTRIBUTING.md so
this template stays short.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One paragraph. The diff already shows the "what" in detail —
focus the prose on the "why" and any non-obvious decision. -->

## How it was verified

<!-- "Ran xcodebuild test" / "Manually clicked X, Y, Z" / "Attached
screenshot below". UI changes need at least a screenshot or recording
per the CONTRIBUTING.md review rule. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `xcodebuild test` passes locally
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot or screen recording
- [ ] New features add tests (domain) or list a manual-verification procedure (UI)
- [ ] Vocabulary matches [`docs/CONVERSATION-MODEL.md`](../docs/CONVERSATION-MODEL.md)
- [ ] Cost-affecting changes are checked against Window → Verify Costs…
- [ ] No hard-coded `/Users/<name>/…` paths or other personal data

## Related issues

<!-- `Closes #123` if applicable. Otherwise a short note on context. -->
